name: Tomura Shigaraki
description:
Here’s the beginning of the villain series! Tomura really likes the outfit 😌

Anyway, decided to have it be where Toga had stolen the clothes cause why would a bunch of wanted villains go to a store? lol (Haven’t decided if I’ll make one for Stain, I just don’t personally see him even wanting to interrupt a gala.)
creator: R0sieP0sie
